title: Environment Considerations for TXT
text: Environment Considerations for TXT Network Considerations The Uniface Server provides transparent network connectivity. Alternatively, you can use any operating system-level networking facilities that support transparent file access. Permissions You are allowed to do anything to a text file which the operating system permits. For more information, see your operating system documentation. System Parameters For information on text file support, see your operating system documentation. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
